messages.content: hai
Hello! How can I assist you today? If you have any questions or need information on a particular topic, feel free to ask.

翻译成中文论文语言We merged the differentially expressed genes from GSE47472 and GSE57691, and analyzed the mRNA functions of 1056 differentially expressed genes using the cluster Profiler [4.4.4] package in R to identify GO and KEGG pathways. Enrichment analyses of the 455 upregulated DEGs (Table 2) showed that the top four terms in BPs included regulation of positive regulation of response
to external stimulus, positive regulation of defense response, regulation of nitric oxide metabolic process and positive regulation of acute inflammatory response. The CC groups were ficolin−1−rich granule membrane, haptoglobin−hemoglobin complex and spanning component of plasma membrane. The MFs in AAA mainly focused on heme binding, cytokine binding and oxygen carrier activity. The KEGG pathway findings of the upregulated DEGs revealed that mRNA was mainly involved in the human cytomegalovirus infection, Chemokine signaling pathway,non−alcoholic fatty liver disease and IL−17 signaling pathway.(Figure 5A) Enrichment analyses of the 601 downregulated DEGs (Table 3) showed that the top three terms in CC groups were respirasome, mitochondrial respirasome,cytochromecomplex and mitochondrial respiratory chain complex IV.

我们合并了GSE47472和GSE57691中的差异表达基因，并使用R中的clusterProfiler [4.4.4]包分析了1056个差异表达基因的mRNA功能，以鉴定GO和KEGG通路。对455个上调差异表达基因(DEGs)的富集分析（表2）显示，生物过程(BPs)中排名前四的术语包括对外部刺激反应的积极调控、防御反应的积极调控、一氧化氮代谢过程的调控以及急性炎症反应的正向调控。细胞组分(CC)群组主要包括富含ficolin-1的颗粒膜、血红蛋白-结合珠蛋白复合体和贯穿细胞膜的组成部分。AAA中的分子功能(MFs)主要集中在血红素结合、细胞因子结合和氧载体活性。上调DEGs的KEGG通路发现主要涉及到人类巨细胞病毒感染、趋化因子信号通路、非酒精性脂肪肝疾病和IL-17信号通路。（图5A）对601个下调差异表达基因(DEGs)的富集分析（表3）显示，CC群组中的前三个术语分别为呼吸体、线粒体呼吸体、细胞色素复合体和线粒体呼吸链复合体IV。
Table4 The BP,CC, MF and KEGG enriched analysis of upregulated DEG between AAA and contro

附件中并未提供具体数据。因此，以下是涉及“表4”（Table 4）的一般性说明模板：

表4：AAA与对照组上调差异表达基因的BP、CC、MF和KEGG富集分析

在比较主动脉瘤（AAA）患者与健康对照组之间的基因表达时，我们对上调的差异表达基因(DEG)进行了生物学过程(BP)、细胞组分(CC)、分子功能(MF)和京都基因与基因组百科全书(KEGG)通路的富集分析。上调的DEGs指的是那些在AAA患者样本中相对于对照组表达量增加的基因。这些分析有助于我们理解与AAA病理生理学相关的生物学机制。富集分析结果展示了哪些生物功能和信号通路与AAA的发展最密切相关。

具体结果如下：

- 生物学过程(BP)中的显著术语可能归纳了与炎症反应、细胞黏附、细胞迁移以及细胞骨架组织有关的功能。
- 细胞组分(CC)中的显著富集可能关涉了特定于细胞内组织，如线粒体、细胞质基质或细胞外基质等。
- 分子功能(MF)中的显著富集可能指向蛋白质结合、酶活性或信号传导受体功能等方面。
- KEGG通路分析可能显示了与病毒感染响应、代谢通路、细胞周期调控或其他与AAA进展相关的信号通路。

这些富集分析为深入探究AAA病理过程的关键分子事件和潜在治疗靶点提供了重要线索。

翻译成中文论文语言According to the degree of each gene, we respectively identified ten hubgenes with a degree>4: CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, EGR1, FOS, ATF3, DUSP1, JUN, MY(Figure 7C); CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, FOS, OSM, IL1B, S100A8, HCK,NCF2(Figure 7D).The intersecting genes are CXCL8,SOCS3,IL6,PTGS2,FOS(Table 5). All of these crucial genes show potential clinical significance.
根据每个基因的度，我们分别鉴定出度数大于4的十个关键基因：CXCL8、SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2、EGR1、FOS、ATF3、DUSP1、JUN、MY（图7C）；CXCL8、SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2、FOS、OSM、IL1B、S100A8、HCK、NCF2（图7D）。交集基因包括CXCL8、SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2、FOS（表5）。所有这些关键基因均显示出潜在的临床意义。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 2 | Differential expressed gene (DEG) analysis of GSE57691. (A)This boxplot represents the normalized data from 50 samples of the experimental group (in red) and 10 samples of the control group (in blue). The horizontal line inside the box represents the median value of the normalized data, the top edge of the box represents the upper quartile, and the bottom edge of the box represents the lower quartile.(B) Heatmap of 237 DEGs. The diagram presents the result of a two-way hierarchical clustering of all the DEGs and samples. Each row in the heatmap represents a sample, and each column represents a gene. The color scale at the right of the heatmap represents the raw Z-score ranging from blue (low expression) to red (high expression). (C) Volcano map of DEGS. The red nodes on the right represent upregulated DEGs and the black nodes on the left represent downregulated DEGs.Criteria used for the identification of differences:|logFC|>1 and P<0.05.

图2 | GSE57691的差异表达基因(DEG)分析。(A)该箱形图代表了实验组50个样本（红色）和对照组10个样本（蓝色）的标准化数据。箱体内部的水平线代表标准化数据的中位数，箱体的顶边代表上四分位数，底边代表下四分位数。(B) 237个DEGs的热图。该图展示了所有DEGs和样本的双向层次聚类结果。热图中的每一行代表一个样本，每一列代表一个基因。热图右侧的颜色刻度表示原始Z分数，范围从蓝色（低表达）到红色（高表达）。(C) DEGs的火山图。右侧的红色节点代表上调的DEGs，左边的黑色节点代表下调的DEGs。识别差异的标准为：|logFC|>1 且 P<0.05。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 3 | Differential expressed gene (DEG) analysis of GSE119717. (A)This boxplot represents the normalized data from 30 samples of the experimental group (in red) and 30 samples of the control group (in blue). The horizontal line inside the box represents the median value of the normalized data, the top edge of the box represents the upper quartile, and the bottom edge of the box represents the lower quartile.(B) Heatmap of 25 DEGs. The diagram presents the result of a two-way hierarchical clustering of all the DEGs and samples. Each row in the heatmap represents a sample, and each column represents a gene. The color scale at the right of the heatmap represents the raw Z-score ranging from blue (low expression) to red (high expression). (C) Volcano map of DEGS. The red nodes on the right represent upregulated DEGs and the black nodes on the left represent downregulated DEGs.Criteria used for the identification of differences:|logFC|>1 and P<0.05.

图3 | GSE119717的差异表达基因(DEG)分析。(A)该箱形图代表了实验组30个样本（红色）和对照组30个样本（蓝色）的标准化数据。箱体内部的水平线代表标准化数据的中位数，箱体的顶边代表上四分位数，底边代表下四分位数。(B) 25个DEGs的热图。该图展示了所有DEGs和样本的双向层次聚类结果。热图中的每一行代表一个样本，每一列代表一个基因。热图右侧的颜色刻度表示原始Z分数，范围从蓝色（低表达）到红色（高表达）。(C) DEGs的火山图。右侧的红色节点代表上调的DEGs，左侧的黑色节点代表下调的DEGs。鉴定差异的标准为：|logFC|>1 且 P<0.05。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 4 | Differential expressed gene (DEG) analysis of GSE47472. (A)This boxplot represents the normalized data from 14 samples of the experimental group (in red) and 8 samples of the control group (in blue). The horizontal line inside the box represents the median value of the normalized data, the top edge of the box represents the upper quartile, and the bottom edge of the box represents the lower quartile.(B) Heatmap of 25 DEGs. The diagram presents the result of a two-way hierarchical clustering of all the DEGs and samples. Each row in the heatmap represents a sample, and each column represents a gene. The color scale at the right of the heatmap represents the raw Z-score ranging from blue (low expression) to red (high expression). (C) Volcano map of DEGS. The red nodes on the right represent upregulated DEGs and the black nodes on the left represent downregulated DEGs.Criteria used for the identification of differences:|logFC|>1 and P<0.05.

图4 | GSE47472的差异表达基因(DEG)分析。(A)该箱形图代表了实验组14个样本（红色）和对照组8个样本（蓝色）的标准化数据。箱体内部的水平线代表标准化数据的中位数，箱体的顶边代表上四分位数，底边代表下四分位数。(B) 25个DEGs的热图。该图展示了所有DEGs和样本的双向层次聚类结果。热图中的每一行代表一个样本，每一列代表一个基因。热图右侧的颜色刻度表示原始Z分数，范围从蓝色（低表达）到红色（高表达）。(C) DEGs的火山图。右侧的红色节点代表上调的DEGs，左侧的黑色节点代表下调的DEGs。鉴定差异的标准为：|logFC|>1 且 P<0.05。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 5 |After merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, GO and KEGG analyses were performed on the upregulated and downregulated DEGs to compare the differences between the experimental group and the control group. (A)It shows the bubble chart for the upregulated genes in GO and KEGG analysis. (B)It shows the bubble chart for the downregulated genes in GO and KEGG analysis. (C)It shows the chord diagram for the enriched terms of upregulated genes. (D)It shows the chord diagram for the enriched terms of downregulated genes.
图5 | 合并GSE47472和GSE57691数据集后，对上调和下调的差异表达基因(DEGs)进行了GO和KEGG分析，以比较实验组与对照组之间的差异。（A）展示了GO和KEGG分析中上调基因的气泡图。（B）展示了GO和KEGG分析中下调基因的气泡图。（C）展示了上调基因富集项的弦图。（D）展示了下调基因富集项的弦图。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 6 |It is a bubble chart of the enriched analysis for upregulated differentially expressed genes in the GSE119717 dataset(A). It is a chord diagram for the enriched analysis(B). It shows a GSEA enrichment analysis of differentially expressed genes after merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.Criteria used for the identification of differences:p.adj<0.05 and FDR (q-value)<0.25(C).The difference ranking plot presents differential expression ranking of genes obtained by merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets where a threshold of |LogFC|>1 and p<0.05 was applied. The horizontal axis indicates the rank position of the logFC, while the vertical axis represents the logFC. The top five and bottom five ranking genes are indicated(D).

图6 | 展示了GSE119717数据集中上调差异表达基因富集分析的气泡图(A)。展示了富集分析的弦图(B)。显示了合并GSE47472和GSE57691数据集后差异表达基因的GSEA富集分析。鉴定差异的标准为：p.adj<0.05 且 FDR（q值）<0.25(C)。差异排名图展现了通过合并GSE47472和GSE57691数据集获得的基因差异表达排序，其中应用了|LogFC|>1 和 p<0.05的阈值。水平轴指示logFC的排名位置，而垂直轴表示logFC。标注了排名前五和后五的基因(D)。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 7 | PPI analysis of candidate differentially expressed genes. The mutual relationships among the candidate genes filtered in the merged GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets were displayed in the network graph(A).The mutual relationships among the candidate genes filtered in the GSE119717 datasets were displayed in the network graph(B).PPI subnetwork of the top 10 hub candidate genes of combined GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets(C).PPI subnetwork of the top 10 hub candidate genes of GSE119717 datasets.  PPI,protein-protein interaction.(D)

图7 | 候选差异表达基因的蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）分析。在合并后的GSE47472和GSE57691数据集中筛选的候选基因之间的相互关系在网络图中展示(A)。在GSE119717数据集中筛选的候选基因之间的相互关系在网络图中展示(B)。合并GSE47472和GSE57691数据集的前10个中心候选基因的PPI子网络(C)。GSE119717数据集的前10个中心候选基因的PPI子网络. PPI指的是蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。(D)。

翻译成中文论文语言FIGURE 8 |The ROC curve was utilized to assess the four selected genes. The area under the ROC curve (AUC) is commonly used to evaluate diagnostic tests. The AUC ranges between 0.5 and 1, with a higher AUC indicating better diagnostic accuracy in predicting the outcome. The closer the AUC is to 1, the better the predictive performance of the variable on the outcome.
图8 | 利用ROC曲线对四个选定基因进行了评估。ROC曲线下面积（AUC）通常用以评估诊断测试的效能。AUC的范围在0.5到1之间，较高的AUC表明在预测结果方面具有更好的诊断准确性。AUC越接近1，说明变量对结果的预测性能越好。
